reviews.comment:
Es aceptable es servicio pero tuve la mala suerte de ir un día de mucha aglomeración de gente.

(Translated by Google)
The service is acceptable, but I had the bad luck to go on a very crowded day.

reviews.comment:
Es muy bueno, tiene varios surtidores, pero en el momento que fui, habían pocos habilitados y una gran cola para cargar nafta

(Translated by Google)
It's very good, it has several pumps, but when I went, only a few were open and there was a long line to fill up.

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención. Aunque siempre hay muchos vehículos, hay muchos surtidores.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Although there are always many vehicles, there are plenty of pumps.

reviews.comment:
Insolitamente, en todas las estaciones del pais hacen como corresponde factura A menos en el ACA central. No voy mas!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Unusually, all stations in the country issue proper invoices, except at the central ACA. I'm not going anymore!

reviews.comment:
Atienden muy bien y rápido. Tienen una muy buena predisposición de atención al cliente. Para los fanáticos de los autos: si te gustan los autos viejos anda con tiempo porque hay muestras que valen la pena ver.

They attention was very well and fast. They have a very good predisposition to customer service. For car fans: if you like old cars, go ahead because there are some models that are worth seeing.

(Translated by Google)
They serve very well and quickly. They have a very good customer service attitude. For car fans: if you like old cars, go ahead because there are some models worth seeing.

Their attention was very good and fast. They have a very good customer service attitude. For car fans: if you like old cars, go ahead because there are some models worth seeing.
